channel.title: Installer fails to find geographic location
channel.description:
Been testing bare metal setups on several machines using the “testers iso” with no new problems with one exception - the installer fails to find my geographic location (using ethernet connection) - but of course I can manually select time zone and no problem.
Is this possibly by design?

item.title: Installer fails to find geographic location
item.dc:creator: leok
item.description:
thanks that iis what i thought…

Read full topic
item.source: Installer fails to find geographic location

item.title: Installer fails to find geographic location
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
No geographic detection is being attempted.

Read full topic
